method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Stop correlation is good, but 1247 has much higher distance and far heavier zone 4/7 pass frequency.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose differs; duty matches, age/kms similarity is moderate.

1311.llm_rationale: High kms similarity is outweighed by negative stop correlation, very high daily distance, and different zone 6 behavior.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose differs; duty matches, kms similarity is high.

1312.llm_rationale: Stop correlation is high, but 1312 is a high-distance production truck with heavy zone 7 activity unlike 155's low-intensity profile.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High, mainly reflecting aligned stop-vector pattern.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose differs; duty matches and kms similarity is high, but age differs.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same Mobile_Eq and MEDIUM duty; kms moderately similar, age less similar.

1363.llm_rationale: Moderate-high stop similarity and comparable daily distance scale; purpose differs but zone 2/4/7 behavior is reasonably close.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose differs; duty matches, age/kms similarity is weak.

1421.llm_rationale: Same purpose/duty helps, but stop correlation is only moderate and 1421 has much longer routes with more zone 8 activity.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
